changelog: Dialer fetch budget: 3-second debounce on fetchLeads() coalesces back-to-back triggers near a dial-completion cycle (pause-time + advanceToNext = 1 actual request, not 2)
Dialer fetch budget: background refresh interval bumped 30s -> 60s; skipped when the dialer tab is hidden (document.visibilityState)
Dialer fetch budget: visibilitychange listener refreshes once when rep tabs back in, so they don't stare at stale queue waiting for next interval
Dialer fetch budget: advanceToNext + manual Refresh button bypass the debounce via force:true — pre-dial freshness preserved
